description: Mem Palace retrieval evaluation set. Each case is a question whose answer should come from at least one of the listed expected_node_titles. Add cases over time as you ingest more memory.

cases.question: how old am I?
cases.notes: Direct lookup; competes with 'Eijjuu is 25 years old' which has the same template.

cases.question: who is my girlfriend?
cases.notes: Direct lookup; the word 'girlfriend' appears in the chunk.

cases.question: who is my kenojo?
cases.notes: Same as above but with the romaji term 'kenojo'. Tests low-resource word handling.

cases.question: what is multi-head attention?
cases.notes: Concept lookup in the Transformer paper.

cases.question: what model architecture does this paper introduce?
cases.notes: Should retrieve a paper chunk; abstract or model section.

cases.question: how does scaled dot-product attention work?
cases.notes: Specific concept that lives in a known section of the paper.

cases.question: why use positional encoding in transformers?
cases.notes: Tests whether retrieval finds the positional-encoding section.
